# commandes grails
## création du projet

grails create-app --inplace --jdk=21 cfagrails


curl -X POST http://localhost:8088/api/login   -H "Content-Type: application/json"   -d '{"username": "admin@peche3000.fr", "password": "password123"}'
{"username":"admin@peche3000.fr","roles":["ROLE_ADMIN"],"token_type":"Bearer","access_token":"eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GGMAMWVtb3DecyoL2r3KkBpRUgbcSqpYQyHBcW34FTQ","expires_in":3600,"refresh_token":"eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..KtoQVuUVJdXjw44gN1o9zTAAqkNyZz1sT3354gOPpro"}
